revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to stub template |name=To a stub template |from=a template shortcut or title that may have been moved (renamed) or merged |to=the target [[WP:stub|stub]] template |template category=Redirects to stub templates }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to stub template |name=To a stub template |from=a template shortcut or title that may have been moved (renamed) or merged |to=the target [[WP:stub|stub]] template |template category=Redirects to stub templates }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to stub template |name=To a stub template |from=a template shortcut or title that may have been moved (renamed) or merged |to=the target [[WP:stub|stub]] template |template category=Redirects to stub templates }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to stub template |name=To a stub template |from=a template shortcut or title that may have been moved (renamed) or merged |to=the target [[WP:stub|stub]] template |template category=Redirects to stub templates }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
